theory.description: Uso de tiempos perfectos para expresar acciones completadas con relevancia en el presente o futuro.
examples: They have not completed the project.

theory.description: Se usa para describir acciones que estaban en progreso antes de otra acción pasada.

formula.negative: Subject + had not been + Verb(-ing) + Complement
formula.question: Had + Subject + been + Verb(-ing) + Complement?

examples: She had been studying before the exam started.
They had not been working long when the manager arrived.
Had you been waiting for a long time?

theory.description: Se usa para expresar acciones que estarán en progreso hasta un momento específico en el futuro.

formula.affirmative: Subject + will have been + Verb(-ing) + Complement
formula.negative: Subject + will not have been + Verb(-ing) + Complement
formula.question: Will + Subject + have been + Verb(-ing) + Complement?

examples: By next year, I will have been working here for five years.
She will not have been living in London for long.
Will you have been studying English for ten years by then?

theory.description: Combinan diferentes tiempos verbales para expresar situaciones hipotéticas complejas.

formula.affirmative: If + Subject + had + Past Participle, Subject + would + Verb (present/future)
formula.negative: If + Subject + had not + Past Participle, Subject + would not + Verb (present/future)
formula.question: Would + Subject + Verb if + Subject + had + Past Participle?

examples: If I had studied harder, I would be at university now.
She would travel more if she had saved money.
Would you be happier if you had chosen another career?

items.name: Uso de la voz pasiva en estructura compleja

theory.description: Aplicación de la voz pasiva en oraciones con múltiples cláusulas o tiempos compuestos.

formula.affirmative: Subject + to be + Past Participle + (by Agent)
formula.negative: Subject + to be + not + Past Participle
formula.question: Is/Was + Subject + Past Participle (by Agent)?

examples: The report has been written by the committee.
The project was not completed on time.
Was the book translated into Spanish?

items.name: Vocabulario académico
items.content: Palabras y expresiones usadas en contextos académicos y formales.

items.name: Expresiones idiomáticas y refranes

items.name: Matices del lenguaje

items.name: Transformar oraciones
items.content: Ejercicios para reestructurar oraciones usando diferentes tiempos y estructuras.

items.name: Completar textos con conectores, modales, tiempos verbales

items.name: Comprensión de lectura
items.content: Ejercicios de análisis y comprensión de textos complejos.

items.name: Comprensión auditiva

items.name: Errores comunes: corregir en un texto
items.content: Identificación y corrección de errores frecuentes en inglés avanzado.

items.name: Debates o role plays con evaluación de fluidez y vocabulario
items.content: Actividades de debate y dramatización para practicar fluidez y vocabulario.

items.name: Ejercicios de uso preciso de vocabulario
items.content: Prácticas para elegir la palabra más adecuada según el contexto.
